nasb.text: For the length of the chambers which were in the outer court was fifty cubits; and behold, the length of those facing the temple was a hundred cubits.

esv.text: For the chambers on the outer court were fifty cubits long, while those opposite the nave were a hundred cubits long.

cnv.text: 朝著外院的房子，長二十五公尺；朝著聖殿的房子，長五十公尺。

ccb.text: 靠近外院的厢房长二十五米，靠近圣殿的厢房则长五十米。
